remarks_html:
Command to all bots.

Sends a command in S>C 0x04 BOTNET_COMMAND to all bots that are currently connected.

If the sending client does not have permission to relay commands to other clients, only the sending client receives the sent command.

The sending client must have permission to broadcast commands. If the client does not meet the access requirement, no response is generated to any user (including the sender itself).
